tile_info.ice_desc: Applies a -2 penalty to attack and defense

login_page.deja_compte: Already have an account? Sign in
login_page.erreur_pseudo_long: Username cannot exceed 10 characters (after trimming extra spaces)

auth_errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home_page.join_error: Unable to join the game — please reconnect.

tutorial.s0_body: PolyArena is an online multiplayer board game. This tutorial walks you through every screen. You can close it anytime and resume later from your profile — your progress is saved.
tutorial.s1_body: This is the home screen. From here, check your balance, open stats, access chat, go to your profile, and join or create a game.
tutorial.a1_stats: Global leaderboard statistics across the platform.
tutorial.a1_chat: Opens the global chat and your channel subscriptions.
tutorial.a1_profile: Opens the quick profile menu (avatar, friends, language, theme).
tutorial.a1_join: Join a public or private existing game.
tutorial.a1_create: Create your own game as the host.
tutorial.s2_body: Tap your avatar at the top right to open this menu. It gives you quick access to your account, friends, and display preferences.
tutorial.a2_avatar: Your avatar and username. Tap to open the full profile page.
tutorial.a2_email: The email address linked to the account.
tutorial.a2_theme: Toggle between the blue and red theme.
tutorial.s3_body: The profile page groups your inventory, in-game stats, account management and the tutorial resume button.
tutorial.a3_inventory: Switch between characters, backgrounds or music you already own.
tutorial.a3_stats: History of your games: classic, CTF, wins, average time.
tutorial.a3_resume: Resume the tutorial from the step you left off.
tutorial.a3_avatar: Change your avatar: pick from owned avatars or upload a photo.
tutorial.s4_body: Find other players, send them friend requests, and see their real-time status (online, offline, in combat).
tutorial.a4_search: Search a player by username to send them a friend request.
tutorial.a4_sent: Requests you’ve sent that are still pending.
tutorial.a4_list: Your friends list with status dot (green = online, orange = in combat, gray = offline).
tutorial.s5_body: Chat with every connected player. Two tabs at the top: the global chat and your personal channels.
tutorial.a5_tab_global: Global chat tab: visible to all connected players.
tutorial.a5_tab_channels: Your personal or joined channels tab.
tutorial.a5_messages: Area where sent and received messages are displayed.
tutorial.a5_emojis: Shortcuts to quickly insert an emoji reaction.
tutorial.a5_input: Type your message here, then tap send.
tutorial.s6_body: Create or join themed channels to chat with a smaller group.
tutorial.a6_tab_channels: “Channels” tab: lists your channels and lets you create or join one.
tutorial.a6_create: Create a new channel or join an existing one via search.
tutorial.a6_list: List of channels you’re subscribed to.
tutorial.s7_body: Spend coins to unlock new characters. Each character has its own unique combat style.
tutorial.a7_card: Preview of the character for sale.
tutorial.a7_locked: “Insufficient”: your balance doesn’t cover the price yet.
tutorial.s8_body: Customize the background of your menus. Purchased backgrounds become selectable from the profile page.
tutorial.a8_card: Preview of the background for sale.
tutorial.s9_body: Buy new soundtracks to play during your games. Each track is selectable from the profile page.
tutorial.a9_card: Preview of the music track for sale.
tutorial.s10_body: As the host, pick a map, set an entry fee (winners split the pot), and launch the room.
tutorial.a10_price: Entry fee in coins that every player pays when the match begins.
tutorial.a10_balance: Your balance after paying the entry fee.
tutorial.a10_create: Create the game and generate an access code.
tutorial.s11_body: Pick a public game from the list, or join a private game by entering its access code.
tutorial.a11_private: Join a private game by entering its 4-digit access code.
tutorial.a11_public_title: List of currently open public games.
tutorial.a11_game_code: Access code and current / maximum player count.
tutorial.a11_game_preview: Preview of the map used for this game.
tutorial.a11_game_status: Status, access type, and entry fee of the game.
tutorial.s12_body: Before each game, pick your avatar and distribute your stat points (life, speed, attack, defense).
tutorial.a12_grid: Grid of your unlocked avatars — tap to select.
tutorial.a12_preview: Animated preview of the selected avatar.
tutorial.a12_stats: Distribute your points among Life, Speed, Attack, and Defense.
tutorial.a12_confirm: Confirm selection and enter the waiting room.
tutorial.s13_body: The host configures the game here. Other players wait until launch.
tutorial.a13_code: Access code to share so others can join.
tutorial.a13_players: Current players out of the maximum allowed.
tutorial.a13_mode: Selected game mode (Classic or Fast Elimination).
tutorial.a13_lobby: Players currently in the waiting room.
tutorial.a13_chat: Waiting room chat, restricted to participants.
tutorial.a13_lock: Lock the game to prevent new players from joining.
tutorial.a13_fog: Enable fog of war (limited visibility around the player).
tutorial.a13_start: Host starts the match — enabled once the lobby is full.
tutorial.s14_body: The goal depends on the mode: in Classic, win 3 combats; in CTF, capture the flag and bring it to your base.
tutorial.a14_board: Game board: tap to move your character, interact with items, and start combat.
tutorial.a14_panel: Player panel: health points, stats, inventory.
tutorial.a14_actions: Available actions (attack, flee) during your turn or a combat.
tutorial.s15_body: At the end of the match, you see a full summary: timings, stats per player, and the coins earned or lost.
tutorial.a15_balance: Balance breakdown: previous, reward, new total.
tutorial.a15_duration: Match duration, number of turns, tiles visited.
tutorial.a15_table: Detailed stats per player: combats, victories, HP, items.

profile_page.delete_account_warning: This action is irreversible! Enter your username to confirm.
profile_page.delete_dialog_message: This action cannot be undone. Do you really want to delete your account?
profile_page.error_username_length: Username must be between 1 and 10 characters
profile_page.error_email_taken: This email is already in use
profile_page.error_update_profile: Could not update. Please try again.

game_creation.title: PolyArena
game_creation.load_error: Could not load games. Please try again later.
game_creation.create_pending: Game creation: lobby hookup coming next.
game_creation.revenez_plus_tard: Check back later or create one
game_creation.no_maps_page_body: You cannot create or edit maps in the mobile app. Creating and publishing games is done in the web client on a computer, with an authorized account. Come back to this screen when games are available.

description.ice: Ice tile, does not affect movement. Click to select.
description.wall: Blocks players’ path. Click to select.
description.water: Water tile, greatly slows movement. Click to select.
description.door: Allows blocking or permitting passage. Click to select. If a door is selected, click on another door to open it.
description.sword: If you have 3 health or less, you gain +2 attack
description.crane: If you have less than 2 health, your opponent cannot deal more than 1 damage at a time
description.resurrection: An extra life is granted upon your first defeat in combat
description.dices: Each time you roll an attack die, you get either the maximum value or the maximum minus one

avatar_detail.in_collection: This character is already in your collection.
avatar_detail.story_fallback: A unique look for your next matches — stand out on the grid.

stories.specter: A silent phantom that slips between the tiles. Specter favors patience and misdirection — ideal if you like to tilt the board without showing your hand.
stories.titan: An immovable colossus with the weight of old stone. Titan is for players who want presence and resilience: hold the line, then break theirs.
stories.whiplash: Speed, edge, and zero hesitation. Whiplash rewards bold moves and punishes anyone who thinks they can outpace you.
stories.yang: Calm surface, decisive finish. Yang channels opposing forces into every step — harmony until the moment you strike.

character_stats_page.title: Choose your stats

tooltip.life_speed: Select a bonus between health and speed
tooltip.attack_defense: Select a bonus between attack and defense

character_stats_page.join_pending: Profile saved — waiting room hookup coming next.

tooltip.speed: Determines turn order and movement points per turn.
tooltip.attack: Determines your attack power. 4 attack points + dice roll.
tooltip.defense: Reduces damage received. 4 defense points + dice roll.

username_popup.title: Enter your username for the game

tooltip.drop_in_out: Allows players to join or leave an ongoing game.
tooltip.public: The game is open to all players.
tooltip.friends_only: Restricts access to your friends only.
tooltip.fog_of_war:
Limits grid visibility to 2 tiles around the player.
Does not apply in debug mode.

start_tooltip.team_size: Each active team must have exactly 2 players
start_tooltip.unassigned: All players must be assigned to a team

loading.virtual_player: You need to unlock the game
loading.pair_number: have an even number of players
loading.message: Do you really want to remove this player?

player_panel.not_on_map: Player not found on the board

game_info_popup.fast_elimination: Fast Elimination: be the last active player to win!
game_info_popup.ctf_objective: Capture the flag and bring it to your starting point to make your team win

tile_tooltip.default: Double-click a flashing tile to perform the action
tile_tooltip.team_hint: Team mode: red tiles — attack an opponent; cyan tiles — trade with a teammate (at least one of you must hold an item).
